role_evidence.attacker: transaction sender and final USDC receiver
role_evidence.attack_contract: root transaction target; verified source exposes test(address,address,address,address), flash-swaps AIC, manipulates the DIP/AIC pair, repays the flash pair, then swaps residual AIC to USDC for the sender
role_evidence.vulnerable_contract: verified DIP token source at 0x6c60... applies a sell fee to AMM-pair recipients and also executes two transfers when either endpoint is the Pancake router because the isRouter branch lacks a return
role_evidence.victim: the DIP/AIC Pancake pair is the manipulated asset-holder; no separate end-user losing account is trace-supported
role_evidence.profit_receiver: router sends final USDC directly to the transaction sender at frame c0050
